chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 603 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 08.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ayaz Shaikh, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Farooq Ali Jatoi, Special Prosecutor ANF..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Special Prosecutor ANF states that, on account of earlier direction in the same crime, within three months, all the witnesses except one have been examined. Learned Counsel for the applicant, however, requires the matter to be proceeded specially on statutory ground. However, it being a case of narcotics, wherein 640 grams of ICE is alleged along with 952 grams of opium, it is preferred that the present bail application be disposed of with a direction that the conclusion of the case be attempted by the trial Court within a period of one month at this stage. Ordered accordingly. The bail application stands disposed of with a direction to the trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of one month hereof. Thereafter, the applicant may have the statutory ground available, in accordance with law. J U D G E Abdul Basit
